blocker.summary: The lane cannot reduce the repository Python count further because the materialized baseline already contains zero .py files.

notes: The initial workspace was not a usable git checkout and had to be materialized from origin before validation.
All candidate Python paths named in the issue are already absent on the checked-out baseline, so this branch records validation and closeout evidence instead of a fresh file deletion.
The Go automation entrypoints corresponding to the deleted Python surfaces remain available and validated through targeted help and go test commands.
